Austrian State Treaty Act 1955
items.description: An Act to provide for carrying into effect the Treaty for the re-establishment of an independent and democratic Austria.

items.title: Transport (Borrowing Powers) Act 1955
National Service Act 1955
Trustee Savings Banks (Pensions) Act 1955
Rural Water Supplies and Sewerage Act 1955 (repealed 1.4.1996)
items.description: An Act to amend the requirements of the Rural Water Supplies and Sewerage Act, 1944, with respect to undertakings under section one of that Act to make contributions towards expenses incurred by local authorities in connection with water supplies, sewerage and sewage disposal in rural localities; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Imperial War Museum Act 1955
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the Board of Trustees of the Imperial War Museum, and to extend their powers of lending objects belonging to the Museum.

items.title: Finance Act 1955
Appropriation Act 1955
Isle of Man (Customs) Act 1955
Army Act 1955 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the army.

items.title: Air Force Act 1955 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the air force.

items.title: German Conventions Act 1955
items.description: An Act to provide for matters relating to certain tribunals agreed to be set up by conventions with the Federal Republic of Germany and to the enforcement of the customs laws of the Federal Republic in pursuance of those conventions by authorities of Her Majesty's forces.

items.title: Revision of the Army and Air Force Acts (Transitional Provisions) Act 1955
items.description: An Act to continue the Army and Air Force Acts until the appointed day, and to make, with respect to the replacement thereof by new provisions, certain transitional provisions and savings and amendments of other enactments relating to those Acts or otherwise to the armed forces of the Crown; to make permanent certain provisions contained in the said Acts; and to repeal certain enactments relating to the armed forces of the Crown which are rendered unnecessary by the expiry of those Acts or are otherwise obsolete.

items.title: Crofters (Scotland) Act 1955 (repealed 5.1.1994)
items.description: An Act to make provision for the reorganisation, development and regulation of crofting in the crofting counties of Scotland; to authorise the making of grants and loans for the development of agricultural production on crofts and the making of grants and loans towards the provision of houses and buildings for crofters, cottars and others of like economic status; to re-enact the provisions of the Landholders Acts with respect to cottars; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Pensions (India, Pakistan and Burma) Act 1955
British Museum Act 1955
Requisitioned Houses and Housing (Amendment) Act 1955
Oil in Navigable Waters Act 1955
Public Service Vehicles (Travel Concessions) Act 1955
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the allowing of free travel or reduced fares on public service vehicles run by local authorities and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Public Libraries (Scotland) Act 1955
items.description: An Act to remove the limitations imposed by section one hundred and ninety-one of the Local Government (Scotland) Act, 1947, and by section fourteen of the Public Libraries Consolidation (Scotland) Act, 1887, on the annual expenditure and the power to borrow money of county and town councils for and in connection with public libraries; to facilitate cooperation among statutory and non-statutory library-authorities; to authorise the revocation of a decision to adopt the Public Libraries Consolidation (Scotland) Act, 1887; and to extend the lending powers of statutory library authorities.

items.title: Children And Young Persons (Harmful Publications) Act 1955
items.description: An Act to prevent the dissemination of certain pictorial publications harmful to children and young persons.

items.title: National Insurance Act 1955
Consolidated Fund Act 1955
New Towns Act 1955
Cocos Islands Act 1955
Colonial Development and Welfare Act 1955
Fisheries Act 1955
items.description: An Act to increase the maximum amount of the grants which may be made out of moneys provided by Parliament to the Herring Industry Board for the promotion of the sale of herring and other purposes; to confer on the Minister of Agriculture and Fisheries and the Secretary of State powers to make grants and loans for the execution, for the benefit of the fishing industry, of harbour and other works and to determine certain existing powers in that behalf; to empower the Secretary of State to operate dredgers; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.
